content.full_text:
May 10, 1990

Ms. Jeanette E. Turvill  
Political Reform Consultant  
Legal Division  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, California 95804

Dear Ms. Turvill:

Pursuant to a conversation held with Mrs. Margaret Hawkins, President, Barstow Unified School District Board of Trustees, on Monday, May 7, 1990, enclosed is a copy of Board Policy P5005 - Conflict of Interest. Please review our policy and provide us with any suggestions for improvement.

At a regular Board meeting held on May 8, 1990, Mr. Pat Aleman, Chairman, Citizens Against Taxes, presented a memo to the Board stating that our newly revised Conflict of Interest policy does not conform to the new regulations. He maintains that board members are required to report their spouse's income on Form 730 Statement of Economic Interest. A copy of this memo is also enclosed. Please provide us with clarification regarding this issue.

Your cooperation in this matter is greatly appreciated. If more information is necessary, please feel free to contact my office at your convenience.

Sincerely,

Eugene M. Feerick  
Superintendent

EMF:pdg  
Enclosures  
L-JT1
